targets.rawSql: SELECT sum(size) AS bytes FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id'
SELECT (sum(size)/pow(1024,4)) * $hot_rate AS usd_mo FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id'
SELECT (sumIf(size, last_accessed < now()-INTERVAL 3 YEAR)/pow(1024,4)) * ($hot_rate - $archive_rate) AS savings FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id'
SELECT sumIf(size, owner_name LIKE 'S-1-%' OR owner_name='') AS bytes FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id'
SELECT extension, sum(size) AS bytes FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id' GROUP BY extension ORDER BY bytes DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT filename, extension, size AS bytes, owner_name, modified FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND size > 1073741824 AND last_accessed < now()-INTERVAL 3 YEAR ORDER BY size DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT extension, count() AS files, sum(size) AS bytes, (sum(size)/pow(1024,4))*($hot_rate - $archive_rate) AS savings_usd_mo FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND last_accessed < now()-INTERVAL 3 YEAR GROUP BY extension ORDER BY bytes DESC LIMIT 20

panels.description: Capacity attributed to each DEMO\GG_* dept group. Files owned by non-GG_* accounts (service accounts, built-in admins, individual users, orphans) and DEMO\GG_AllEmployees are bucketed as UNATTRIBUTABLE — matches Symphony's native Chargeback Report (page 7 of the PDF).

targets.rawSql: SELECT multiIf(owner_name LIKE 'DEMO\\GG_%' AND owner_name != 'DEMO\\GG_AllEmployees', owner_name, 'UNATTRIBUTABLE') AS chargeback_group, sum(size) AS bytes FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id' GROUP BY chargeback_group ORDER BY bytes DESC

panels.title: Chargeback by Dept Group (matches Symphony native)

list.name: run_id
list.query: SELECT run_id FROM symphony.scan_results GROUP BY run_id ORDER BY max(run_start_time) DESC
